title: CatBoost correction with higher l2_leaf_reg
summary: Increase CatBoost L2 regularization for the correction model.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Change only CatBoost l2_leaf_reg to a higher value than the parent. Keep depth, learning rate, iterations, RealMLP core, and blend weight unchanged.
expected_effect: Make the CatBoost correction more stable and less overfit.
risk: Over-regularization can make the correction too weak.
